targets.$comment: Populate with per-method target values once Phase 1 produces baseline data. Example: { "SendCommand.mean_ns_max": 2000, "SendCommand.allocated_bytes_max": 4096 }

stabilityOverrides.$comment: Keys are matched as 'ClassName.Method' or 'ClassName.Method(Params)'. Matching entries are excluded from the stable/unstable headline ratio and from regression detection.
stabilityOverrides.BulkheadBenchmarks.GetMetrics: Semaphore-backed metrics read under benchmark lock contention; CoV 19-29% even at N=29 is inherent to SemaphoreSlim contention.
stabilityOverrides.BulkheadBenchmarks.AcquireMultiple_ThenR: Acquire + release cycles across a SemaphoreSlim; CoV 12% at N=29 is inherent to the lock release wake-up path.
stabilityOverrides.RateLimitingBenchmarks.RecordSuccess: Token-bucket rate limiter under burst updates; CoV 15% at N=5 / ~12% at N=30 is inherent to the Interlocked-based counters.
stabilityOverrides.RateLimitingBenchmarks.RecordFailure: Token-bucket rate limiter under burst updates; CoV 13% at N=30 is inherent.
stabilityOverrides.RateLimitingBenchmarks.AcquireAsync_Simp: Async rate limiter acquire path; CoV ~18% is inherent to the PeriodicTimer-backed refill.
stabilityOverrides.RateLimitingBenchmarks.GetState: Token-bucket rate limiter state read; CoV 15% at N=15-27 is inherent to Interlocked-based counters on shared runner.
stabilityOverrides.RateLimitingBenchmarks.AcquireAndRecordS: Combined acquire+record op; CoV ~14% at N=15 is inherent to the contention path.
stabilityOverrides.BulkheadBenchmarks.TryAcquireAsync_HighL: SemaphoreSlim acquire on high-limit bulkhead; CoV ~10% at N=27 is inherent to the contention path.
